title.rendered: THE IMPERIAL ADDRESS – Roman-Themed Villa Plots by Address Makers

content.rendered: The Imperial Address – Roman-Themed Villa Plots by Address Makers is a premium Roman-themed villa plot township located in Chandapura–Anekal, Bangalore, spread across 50 acres and featuring 712 fully developed premium plots. Designed with distinctive Roman-inspired architecture and landscaped community spaces, the project offers ready-to-build plots with completed infrastructure and spot registration, making it an attractive option for both end users and investors. The secure gated township features a grand 20,000 sq.ft clubhouse and a wide range of lifestyle amenities including a swimming pool, gym, indoor sports facilities, co-working lounge, restaurant, and multiple sports courts. Strategically located with excellent connectivity to Electronic City, Hosur Road, and major growth corridors, the project is positioned in one of South Bangalore’s rapidly developing investment destinations. Ideal for custom villa construction and long-term appreciation, The Imperial Address presents a clear-title, compliant investment opportunity, with limited inventory available in select premium-facing plots.
